description: baseline (Mod 1: precompute AT + array ops for W)
adaptive CG tol (0.1 early/1e-3 late) — MADE destroyed, sigmoid weights need accurate z
AMG preconditioner — V-cycle not symmetric, CG gives wrong solutions, MADE degraded
SGS preconditioner — triangular solve overhead too high per CG step (4x slower)
CHOLMOD direct solver (beta=1e-6) — exact solve changes IRLS trajectory, MADE wrong for 5 objects
numba JIT PCG: eliminates Python loop overhead, pre-alloc buffers, int32 warmup fix
parallel prange SpMV — thread launch overhead (~72us/call) exceeds benefit for n<60k
SGS preconditioner (numba) — compilation hangs 3+ min, NaN residual on harvest (diagonal bug)
IC(0) preconditioner (numba) — bear MADE +13.8% (factorization breakdown at discontinuities changes IRLS trajectory), harvest not faster
SSOR preconditioner (numba) — same root cause as IC0: bear MADE +14.7%, faster convergence sends IRLS to wrong local min
fastmath=True on _pcg_jacobi — LLVM SIMD vectorization of AXPY/dot loops, 18% speedup, MADE unchanged
precompute C matrix: A_mat.data=C@w replaces sparse matmul each iter, 11% speedup, MADE unchanged
cache A_i@z in weight update, reuse for energy check — saves 4 SpMVs per IRLS iter, MADE unchanged
fused _update_weights_energy + _spmatvec_inplace numba kernels — eliminates allocs/dispatch, 8% speedup, MADE unchanged
module-level numba JIT warmup — moves cache load to import time, saves ~0.5s wall time, MADE unchanged
_build_C_csr replaces _build_C_coo: direct CSR build, no COO intermediate — code simplification, negligible perf change, MADE unchanged
